brand.name: Beyond The Ordinary Show
brand.tagline: Personal Transformation. Global Change. One Conversation at a Time.

offer.what: Free live webinar series (Beyond The Ordinary Show) featuring 30+ spiritual thought leaders per season, used as the top-of-funnel lead engine. Core paid product is 'Living in the Extraordinary' — a $39/month community membership with weekly live transmissions, Q&As, and direct access to host John Burgos. Additional revenue from a marketplace of speaker courses and programs, audio pocket guides, and personal mentorship (pricing not publicly listed).
offer.coreOutcome: Move from confusion, anxiety, and fear to clarity, ease, and love — spiritual awakening and decisive personal transformation, supported by a community of kindred spirits.
offer.pricePoint: $39/month (no contract) for core membership; free entry via show opt-in; marketplace items variable (estimated $97–$500+); mentorship pricing unknown
offer.commitment: Month-to-month, no contracts for membership; free tier has no commitment
leadMagnets: Free access to live webinar replays (email opt-in)

audience.icp: Spiritually curious adults (skewing women, ages 35–65) who feel stuck, unseen, or unfulfilled by mainstream culture and are actively exploring consciousness expansion, energy work, and personal transformation. They know what they want but struggle to take consistent action.
painPoints: Feeling confused, anxious, or spiritually lost
Wanting deeper meaning that mainstream media doesn't offer
Feeling unseen or misunderstood in everyday life
Knowing their direction but unable to move forward
Seeking authentic community of like-minded spiritual seekers
segments: Free show attendees (top of funnel — replay opt-ins, podcast listeners)
Marketplace buyers (one-off course or program purchasers)
Mentorship clients (high-ticket, direct access to John)

salesCycle.length: Days to weeks — free content builds trust before paid conversion
salesCycle.trial: Yes — free live calls and replays serve as the trial experience; no time-limited free trial for the paid membership
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Email nurture from replay opt-in → repeated webinar attendance → organic upsell to Living in the Extraordinary membership or marketplace offer
salesCycle.topObjection: Is this worth paying for when so much is free? / Skepticism about whether a spiritual community will create real, lasting change

ahaMoment: Attending a first live webinar transmission and experiencing a felt sense of connection, resonance with a speaker, and a tangible insight or energetic shift — the moment the community feels 'real' and transformative rather than just content consumption.

retention.recurring: Yes — $39/month membership with weekly live sessions and on-demand replays
retention.expansion: Marketplace program purchases from featured speakers, personal mentorship with John, live events attendance
retention.churnRisk: Members who don't show up to live calls lose the sense of community and connection that justifies the subscription; content fatigue if transmissions feel repetitive; no accountability structure built in

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — free opt-ins likely receive minimal structured onboarding beyond a replay link
Lead-Magnet Nurture — large pool of free replay opt-ins almost certainly under-nurtured toward the $39/month membership
Trial/Consult Conversion — no formal conversion sequence from free → paid identified
Booking & Reminders — live webinar show-up rates likely low without reminder/pre-frame sequences
Renewal & Anniversary — month-to-month members have no retention touchpoints or milestone celebrations
Win-Back / Re-Engagement — lapsed free subscribers and churned members not being reactivated
toneVoice: Inspirational, warm, and mystical — uses spiritual language naturally (transmissions, consciousness, activation, awakening) without being preachy. Inclusive and community-first. Copy leans emotional and heart-centered rather than logical or feature-driven. Not overtly salesy; trust is built through generosity (free content) before any ask.
compliance: Standard CAN-SPAM / GDPR applicable. No HIPAA, financial, or legal-sector constraints. Spiritual wellness content — standard disclaimer language around personal results advisable but no regulated-industry restrictions.
